pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic data generated by seed_library.py and setup_task.sh. Papers are seeded into local Zotero SQLite database at /home/ga/Zotero/zotero.sqlite. Tags are injected programmatically.

privileged_info_summary: The task delete_obsolete_tags@1 has a synthetic Zotero library with 6 junk tags ('imported', 'to-read-maybe', 'uncategorized', 'DUPLICATE', '_temp', 'needs-review') to be deleted and 5 good tags ('deep-learning', 'computer-science', 'information-theory', 'physics', 'NLP') to be preserved. Data is generated programmatically via seed_library.py and stored in local SQLite database. Task difficulty is medium. Verification checks database state to confirm junk tags are deleted (not existing in tags table) and good tags remain with associated items.
